ddls:
CREATE TABLE "songs" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* File type of the song */,
  "song_title" TEXT /* Title of the song */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the album the song belongs to */,
  "is_favorite" INTEGER /* Indicates if the song is marked as a favorite by the user */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the song in seconds */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the song (if available) */,
  "explicit_content" INTEGER /* Indicates if the song contains explicit content */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the song has been played */,
  "last_played" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the song was played */,
  "added_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who added the song to the library (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_added_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("added_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "album_title" TEXT /* Title of the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist who created the album */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the album was released */,
  "label" TEXT /* Record label of the album */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the album (if different from the artist's genre) */,
  "total_tracks" INTEGER /* Total number of tracks on the album */,
  "producer" TEXT /* Producer(s) of the album */,
  "cover_art_url" TEXT /* URL of the album cover art */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the artist's music */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the artist */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON object containing links to the artist's social media profiles */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the artist's official website */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the artist (if applicable) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the service */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the user was active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the playlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the playlist was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the playlist was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_songs" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the song was added to the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id", "song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_favorites" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the user */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song marked as a favorite */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the song was marked as a favorite */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "song_id")
)
